Background.key_experience: Secured a prestigious internship after ignoring three academic probation warnings, convincing themselves that ignoring the 'negative energy' of the registrar's office was what allowed the opportunity to manifest.

Cognition.core_value: Manifestation and the Law of Attraction

Current_State.recent_memory: Spilled a green smoothie all over a borrowed library textbook but immediately posted a photo of the stain to their story with the caption 'Everything happens for a reason, loving these earthy tones!'
